View Menu 
Flu Resources 
Aug. 14, 2024 
Purpose 
This resources page for flu is specifically designed for partners to access and use various materials to share about flu and flu vaccination. These resources cover a wide range of topics related to symptoms, treatment options, prevention strategies, and more. It provides partners and health care providers with engaging and informative content that they can easily incorporate into their own communication efforts to educate their audiences about flu and promote preventive measures.
